name: Super Jigsaw Puzzle: Generations
short_description: If you like to make puzzles, Super Jigsaw Puzzle is your game. Enjoy its comfortable and intuitive interface and its relaxing music that will allow you to concentrate on the difficult task of solving these beautiful photos that pose a real challenge for lovers of puzzles.
detailed_description:
If you like to make puzzles, Super Jigsaw Puzzle: Generations is your game.

Enjoy its comfortable and intuitive interface and its relaxing music that will allow you to concentrate on the difficult task of solving these beautiful photos that suppose a real challenge for puzzle lovers.

Drag the pieces to their position, form groups with them or use the available boxes to divide them by colors.

Configurable snap system to avoid stress.

Features


  • 70+ different puzzles!!
  • Autosave, you will not lose your progress
  • 4 levels of difficulty
  • You can form groups with the pieces and combine them together
  • Configurable snap
  • Zoom
  • Relaxing music and atmosphere

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Spanish - Latin America, Portuguese - Brazil
